args:
set -eu
bundle_dir=$(mktemp -d)
explain_json=$(mktemp)
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- explain --format json -O o0 > "$explain_json"
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- build --out "$bundle_dir" -O o0 >/dev/null
python3 - "$explain_json" "$bundle_dir/optimization_explain.json" <<'PY'
import json, sys
explain = json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))
opt = json.load(open(sys.argv[2]))
assert explain['plan']['optimization_envelope']['level'] == 'o0'
assert explain['optimization_explain']['profile_name'] == 'minimal_dev'
assert opt['level'] == 'o0'
assert opt['graph_actions'][0]['effect'] == 'cuda_graphs=disabled'
planes = {node['plane'] for node in explain['plan']['shape_envelope']['nodes']}
assert 'CudaGraph' not in planes
PY
printf 'optimization-levels\n'
